hero.title: Routines you have time for — even on a Monday morning.
hero.subtitle: Milify turns your daily routines into a simple QR flow in your pocket. Staff tick things off, leaders see what's done at a glance, and parents get messages in their own language.

why.title: A checklist shouldn't feel like another system.
why.body: Opening routines on a sticky note, fire safety in a binder, parent messages across three different chats. Milify puts the day's routines on one calm page that's always close — in the hallway, on the wall, in a pocket.
bullets: Opens with the phone camera, no app
One clear picture of what's done today

how.title: From QR code to ticked-off routine in under a minute.
how.body: We set up your rooms and routines. You print the QR codes and put them where the work happens. Staff log in once, then tick things off with a single tap.

steps.title: Set up your routines
steps.body: Opening, closing, cleaning, fire safety — your own checklists, per room.

steps.title: Put up the QR codes
steps.body: Each checklist gets its own code. Print and place it where you work — by the coat hooks, in the kitchen, in the hallway.

steps.title: Tick off, follow up
steps.body: Staff mark tasks done with a tap. Leaders see in Follow-up what's done, what's missing and who did what.

modules.title: Exactly what a preschool needs — nothing more.
modules.body: Milify is three calm modules: Routines for the daily work, Follow-up for leaders, and a simple way to reach parents in their own language.

items.title: RUT — Routines
items.desc: Checklists with frequency, owner and timestamps. Each checklist has its own QR code that opens it directly.

items.title: KLARA — Follow-up
items.desc: Today's picture in one view. What's done, what's missing, what was missed last week. Filter by room or person.

items.title: LIV — Communication
items.desc: Write a message in Swedish. Parents open their link and read it translated into their own language.

trust.title: We store only what you type in.
trust.body: No tracking pixels. No behavioural analysis. No extra accounts for children or families. Staff get simple logins — parents reach their page through a private link.
bullets: Simple accounts for staff, none for children

contact.title: Reach out — it's a short call.
contact.body: Tell us a little about your preschool and we'll get back within a working day.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thanks, we'll be in touch shortly.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
